parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Send file to inbox

actor User
participant REST
participant "Lookup Service" as Lookup
participant "VFS Service" as VFS
participant "Storage Service" as Storage
participant S3

User -> Lookup : get User2 inbox info <&key>(login/password)
Lookup -> User : User2 <&key>**public key** and /**inbox** access creds
User -> Storage : encrypt and save file to user's inbox location
Storage -> S3 : persistence
S3 -> Storage : success
Storage -> User : success

@enduml
```
